If one would have gone for the 620 OTM puts no guarantee it would have hit.

comment.body: ah gotcha. Lowest theta meaning lowest time decay so less hit to that option as time passes. High gamma will make option price move significantly even with small change in underlying price. If we are betting in the right direction you end up making good money. Good tips.
